subject: Sonia, a young researcher figure in warm travel clothes, outdoors in a cheerful rural setting
description: A figure in a warm rust and tan coat over shorts stands outdoors in front of a house with lush greenery behind them. The pose is animated and outward-facing, arms gesturing expressively, suggesting an energetic and sociable character. The setting is bright and pastoral — grass, trees, and a building with a warm domestic feel. The mood is cheerful and approachable.
foreground: young figure in rust coat and shorts, expressive gesture
background: house exterior, green trees, bright sky
